source: independent (non-author) general-purpose agent reviewing data/aggregates/build-reasoning.json against the source kit+items; suggested rewrites ground-checked by copy-verify, then applied back

midlane.quote: Power and penetration giving jungle lifesteal to clear and sustain.
midlane.issue: Spirit Of Amir's lifesteal only applies in the jungle; in midlane it grants power instead
midlane.rewrite: Power and penetration that turns into bonus magical power outside the jungle.

midlane.quote: Stack armor and health early so Countess can stack Haemorrhage with Shadow Slip and Eventide, then Feast to suppress and execute and survive long enough to matter as midlane.
midlane.issue: Build has no armor or tank items; all items are magical power, so 'stack armor and health' is unsupported

midlane.quote: Little kill power — Countess Feast locks her onto one target; she's fragile and exposed mid-suppress, so you just soak damage without threatening anyone.
midlane.issue: Describes a tank/soak build but the items are all magical power with real kill threat

offlane.quote: Power and penetration giving jungle lifesteal to clear and sustain.
offlane.issue: Spirit Of Amir's lifesteal only applies in the jungle; in offlane it grants power instead
offlane.rewrite: Power and penetration that turns into bonus magical power outside the jungle.

offlane.quote: Stack armor and health early so Countess can stack Haemorrhage with Shadow Slip and Eventide, then Feast to suppress and execute and survive long enough to matter as offlane.
offlane.issue: Build has no armor or tank items; all items are magical power, so 'stack armor and health' is unsupported

offlane.quote: Little kill power — Countess Feast locks her onto one target; she's fragile and exposed mid-suppress, so you just soak damage without threatening anyone.
offlane.issue: Describes a tank/soak build but the items are all magical power with real kill threat

jungle.quote: Stack armor and health early so Countess can stack Haemorrhage with Shadow Slip and Eventide, then Feast to suppress and execute and survive long enough to matter as jungle.
jungle.issue: Build has no armor or tank items; all items are magical power, so 'stack armor and health' is unsupported

jungle.quote: Little kill power — Countess Feast locks her onto one target; she's fragile and exposed mid-suppress, so you just soak damage without threatening anyone.
jungle.issue: Describes a tank/soak build but the items are all magical power with real kill threat

offlane.quote: Viper adds more armor and staying power so Crunch survives the fight.
offlane.issue: Wrong item description: Viper gives attack speed, physical power and penetration (armor shred), not armor or health
offlane.rewrite: Viper adds attack speed, power and armor shred so Crunch chews through tankier targets.

jungle.quote: Viper adds more armor and staying power so Crunch survives the fight.
jungle.issue: wrong-item: Viper grants no armor or health
jungle.rewrite: Viper adds attack speed and penetration so Crunch shreds armor as he keeps hitting.

carry.quote: Viper adds more armor and staying power so Drongo survives the fight.
carry.issue: wrong-item: Viper grants no armor or health
carry.rewrite: Viper adds attack speed and penetration so Drongo shreds armor as he keeps firing.

jungle.quote: Viper adds more armor and staying power so Feng Mao survives the fight.
jungle.issue: wrong-item: Viper grants no armor or health
jungle.rewrite: Viper adds attack speed and penetration so Feng Mao shreds armor as he keeps hitting.

offlane.quote: Viper adds more armor and staying power so Feng Mao survives the fight.
offlane.issue: wrong-item: Viper grants no armor or health
offlane.rewrite: Viper adds attack speed and penetration so Feng Mao shreds armor as he keeps hitting.

support.quote: Build cooldown and utility so Maco can poke and heal with Maco Gift, slow with Sparkle, then Maco Strike for a long-range pick repeatedly to keep the team alive in the support.
support.rewrite: Build cooldown and utility so Maco can poke and heal with Maco Gift, slow with Sparkle, then Maco Strike for a long-range pick repeatedly to keep the team alive as support.

support.quote: Build cooldown and utility so Mourn can pull with Abduct vines, Contagion to heal allies, then peel with Beguile while sustaining repeatedly to keep the team alive in the support.
support.rewrite: Build cooldown and utility so Mourn can pull with Abduct vines, Contagion to heal allies, then peel with Beguile while sustaining repeatedly to keep the team alive as support.

carry.quote: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Murdock no real escape but his slow; once dived he can't peel himself.
carry.rewrite: Squishy with no safety net — Murdock has no real escape beyond his speed boost; once dived he can't protect himself.

offlane.quote: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Murdock no real escape but his slow; once dived he can't peel himself.
offlane.rewrite: Squishy with no safety net — Murdock has no real escape beyond his speed boost; once dived he can't protect himself.

midlane.quote: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Murdock no real escape but his slow; once dived he can't peel himself.
midlane.rewrite: Squishy with no safety net — Murdock has no real escape beyond his speed boost; once dived he can't protect himself.

carry.quote: Viper adds more armor and staying power so Revenant survives the fight.
carry.issue: wrong item description: Viper grants no armor/health
carry.rewrite: Viper adds attack speed, power and penetration, shredding the target's armor as you stack hits.

jungle.quote: Attack speed that lowers a sidearm cooldown and stacks a debuff.
jungle.issue: jargon 'sidearm' a new player won't get
jungle.rewrite: Attack speed that builds stacks on the target, then triggers bonus on-hit damage.

offlane.quote: Attack speed that lowers a sidearm cooldown and stacks a debuff.
offlane.issue: jargon 'sidearm' a new player won't get
offlane.rewrite: Attack speed that builds stacks on the target, then triggers bonus on-hit damage.

carry.quote: Paper-thin once the combo's spent — Skylar fragile and hover leaves her exposed; dove early she has no escape.
carry.rewrite: Paper-thin once the combo's spent — Skylar is fragile and her Air Assault hover leaves her exposed; dive her early and she has no escape.

carry.quote: Squishy with no safety net — Skylar fragile and hover leaves her exposed; dove early she has no escape.
carry.rewrite: Squishy with no safety net — Skylar is fragile and her Air Assault hover leaves her exposed; dive her early and she has no escape.

carry.quote: Needs time to ramp the sustain — Skylar fragile and hover leaves her exposed; dove early she has no escape.
carry.rewrite: Needs time to ramp the sustain — Skylar is fragile and her Air Assault hover leaves her exposed; dive her early and she has no escape.

midlane.quote: Paper-thin once the combo's spent — Skylar fragile and hover leaves her exposed; dove early she has no escape.
midlane.rewrite: Paper-thin once the combo's spent — Skylar is fragile and her Air Assault hover leaves her exposed; dive her early and she has no escape.

midlane.quote: Squishy with no safety net — Skylar fragile and hover leaves her exposed; dove early she has no escape.
midlane.rewrite: Squishy with no safety net — Skylar is fragile and her Air Assault hover leaves her exposed; dive her early and she has no escape.

midlane.quote: Needs time to ramp the sustain — Skylar fragile and hover leaves her exposed; dove early she has no escape.
midlane.rewrite: Needs time to ramp the sustain — Skylar is fragile and her Air Assault hover leaves her exposed; dive her early and she has no escape.

offlane.quote: Little kill power — Steel all peel and zone, little kill power; ignored, he can't force anything, so you just soak damage without threatening anyone.
offlane.issue: "little kill power" stated twice in one line; clipped grammar
offlane.rewrite: Little kill power — Steel is all peel and zone; ignored, he can't force anything, so you just soak damage without threatening anyone.

support.quote: Little kill power — Steel all peel and zone, little kill power; ignored, he can't force anything, so you just soak damage without threatening anyone.
support.issue: "little kill power" stated twice in one line; clipped grammar
support.rewrite: Little kill power — Steel is all peel and zone; ignored, he can't force anything, so you just soak damage without threatening anyone.

carry.quote: Stack armor and health early so Wraith can poke with Knock Knock and Peekaboo, reposition in Surprise Surprise stealth, then snipe with Back It Up and survive long enough to matter as carry.
carry.issue: no armor/health items in this carry build; misleading stat focus
carry.rewrite: Stack power and penetration early so Wraith can poke with Knock Knock and Peekaboo, reposition in Surprise Surprise stealth, then snipe with Back It Up and out-damage the carry fight.

midlane.quote: Stack armor and health early so Wraith can poke with Knock Knock and Peekaboo, reposition in Surprise Surprise stealth, then snipe with Back It Up and survive long enough to matter as midlane.
midlane.issue: no armor/health items in this midlane build; misleading stat focus
midlane.rewrite: Stack power and penetration early so Wraith can poke with Knock Knock and Peekaboo, reposition in Surprise Surprise stealth, then snipe with Back It Up and out-damage the midlane fight.

jungle.quote: Stack armor and health early so Yurei can apply Soul Rip with abilities, then Severance collisions and Soulstorm to detonate the marks and survive long enough to matter as jungle.
jungle.issue: no armor items in this build; pool is all power/penetration
jungle.rewrite: Stack power and penetration early so Yurei can apply Soul Rip with abilities, then Severance collisions and Soulstorm to detonate the marks as jungle.

offlane.quote: Stack armor and health early so Yurei can apply Soul Rip with abilities, then Severance collisions and Soulstorm to detonate the marks and survive long enough to matter as offlane.
offlane.issue: no armor items in this build; pool is all power/penetration
offlane.rewrite: Stack power and penetration early so Yurei can apply Soul Rip with abilities, then Severance collisions and Soulstorm to detonate the marks as offlane.

support.quote: Power and penetration giving jungle lifesteal to clear and sustain.
support.issue: Spirit of Amir's lifesteal only triggers in the jungle; a support gets the power half instead, so 'jungle lifesteal' is misleading for this role
support.rewrite: Power and penetration; in the jungle it grants magical lifesteal, otherwise extra magical power.

support.quote: Attack speed that lowers a sidearm cooldown and stacks a debuff.
support.issue: 'sidearm' jargon; Spectra reduces Prisma's cooldown and stacks Prism, not a sidearm
support.rewrite: Attack speed that stacks Prism on the target and triggers bonus Prisma damage at three stacks.

midlane.quote: Attack speed that lowers a sidearm cooldown and stacks a debuff.
midlane.issue: 'sidearm' jargon; Spectra reduces Prisma's cooldown and stacks Prism
midlane.rewrite: Attack speed that stacks Prism on the target and triggers bonus Prisma damage at three stacks.

offlane.quote: Attack speed that lowers a sidearm cooldown and stacks a debuff.
offlane.issue: 'sidearm' jargon; Spectra reduces Prisma's cooldown and stacks Prism
offlane.rewrite: Attack speed that stacks Prism on the target and triggers bonus Prisma damage at three stacks.

coach.quote: Make jungle your primary queue and play it on a scaling tempo: clear, then look for picks once your hero comes online rather than coin-flip early dives — your record past 32 minutes is 78% vs 63% in short games, so let the game grow.
coach.rewrite: Make jungle your primary queue and play it on a scaling tempo: clear, then look for picks once your hero comes online rather than coin-flip early dives — you win 7 of 9 long games versus 5 of 8 short ones, so let the game grow.

coach.quote: You win 78% of games past 32 minutes versus 63% in short ones — pick scaling comps and avoid early all-ins, because patience is your edge.
coach.rewrite: You win 7 of 9 long games versus 5 of 8 short ones — pick scaling comps and avoid early all-ins, because patience is your edge.
